programmes.show_name: If You Can't Do The Time
programmes.show_description: A real estate mogul with mafia connections is found brutally murdered in the Nevada desert. Was it the mob or his marriage that led to his ultimate demise?
The beauty queen and the buried riches. How a love triangle, drugs and a wild treasure hunt, all lead to murder. The fascinating case of Sandy Murphy
A real estate mogul with mafia connections is found brutally murdered in the Nevada desert.  Was it the mob, or his marriage, that led to his ultimate demise?
The mother of an honor student is found murdered, and now her daughter and boyfriend are hiding a deadly secret. Could these high school sweethearts be going from Prom to Prison?
The beauty queen and the buried riches. How a love triangle, drugs and a wild treasure hunt, all lead to murder. The fascinating case of Sandy Murphy
...With Vinnie Politan. The series looks beyond the usual suspects to bring you the gripping stories of everyday people caught up in a world of deception and manipulation as they become accomplices.

Actress Lana Clarkson was found dead in the home of famed music producer Phil Spector. Spector claims she took her own life, while the evidence says otherwise, but what will the jury decide?
What was the motive behind Erik and Lyle Menendez brutally murdering their parents? The prosecution said it was greed, but the defense claimed a dark family secret led to the killings.
Michael Jackson's personal doctor Conrad Murray took an oath to first do no harm. But that's exactly what prosecutors say Murray did when Jackson died from an overdose of a powerful anesthesia drug.
